rationale: For a privacy-focused proxy browser ('Killswitch'), we need an ultra-clean, stealthy, function-first dark mode. Emojis make it look toy-like; replacing them with crisp SVGs and high-contrast geometric typography ensures an authoritative, modern, 'power-user' feel.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use tight tracking for headings (tracking-tighter) and uppercase/wide tracking for overlines and labels (tracking-[0.2em]). For UI text (tabs, address bar), prioritize high legibility.

address_bar.background_classes: bg-[#1e1e1e] border border-white/10 focus-within:border-white/30 focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-white/30

tabs.active_style: bg-[#141414] text-white rounded-t-md border-t border-x border-white/10 relative z-10 flex items-center justify-between px-3 gap-2
tabs.inactive_style: bg-transparent text-white/60 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-t-md flex items-center justify-between px-3 gap-2
tabs.close_button: opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full p-0.5

new_tab.search_box: max-w-xl w-full rounded-2xl bg-[#1e1e1e] border border-white/10 p-4 focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-white/30 shadow-lg text-lg
new_tab.quick_links_grid: grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-6 gap-6 sm:gap-8 mt-12 max-w-3xl w-full

buttons.icon_button: p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-white/10 text-white/70 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent text-red-500 border border-red-500/50 hover:bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

surfaces.panel: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-xl

icon_mapping.instructions: Replace ALL emojis throughout the UI with these SVGs. Add 'react-icons' package (yarn add react-icons) if not present. Use lucide-react for UI and react-icons/fa for exact brand logos.

navigation.shield: Shield (lucide-react, for proxy/secure indicator in address bar)

media_and_images.instructions_to_main_agent: Use this background image for the New Tab page (behind the search and quick links) or the Login/Register screens. Apply an overlay (e.g., bg-black/70 or bg-[#0a0a0a]/80) to ensure content remains readable. Do NOT use placeholder text for logos; use the exact react-icons specified above.

image_urls.description: A dark, textured minimal surface for the new tab and login backgrounds.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle background shifts (bg-white/5 to bg-white/10). Maintain instant UI response without excessive bouncy animations.
motion_and_interaction.focus: High contrast ring (focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-white/30 focus-visible:outline-none) for inputs and address bar.
motion_and_interaction.tabs: Instant state switch to feel extremely snappy, native, and lightweight.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Grey text must be at least text-white/60.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Apply explicit data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='tab-close-btn', data-testid='nav-back-btn', data-testid='address-bar-input', data-testid='quick-link-google').
